mapper.update:
update wings_student
gmt_modified = now(),
student_no = #{studentNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
student_name = #{studentName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
id_no = #{idNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
academy = #{academy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
campus = #{campus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
major = #{major,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
poor_level = #{poorLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sex = #{sex,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
class_name = #{className,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
nation = #{nation,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
qq = #{qq,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
grade = #{grade,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update wings_student set gmt_modified = now(), student_no = #{studentNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, student_name = #{studentName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, id_no = #{idNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, academy = #{academy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, campus = #{campus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, major = #{major,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, poor_level = #{poorLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sex = #{sex,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, class_name = #{className,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, nation = #{nation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, qq = #{qq,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, grade = #{grade,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert:
insert into wings_student (gmt_create, gmt_modified, student_no, student_name, id_no, academy, campus, major, poor_level, sex, class_name, nation, phone, email, qq) values
(now(), now(), #{t.studentNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{t.studentName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{t.idNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{t.academy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{t.campus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{t.major,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{t.poorLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{t.sex,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{t.className,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{t.nation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{t.phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{t.email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{t.qq,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
